summary: Completed testing of Iteration 11 features: Master Admin seed, Promote HR to Admin, and Email with Excel on endorsement submission. All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.

Backend: Master Admin wrong password returns 401 - PASS
Backend: Master Admin can list all users via GET /api/users - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/promote promotes HR to Admin - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/promote returns 400 if already Admin - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id}/promote returns 403 for non-Admin caller - PASS
Backend: Unique email enforcement still works (400 on duplicate) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/endorsements creates endorsement successfully - PASS
Backend: Admin login with admin / admin123 - PASS
Frontend: Master Admin can login and access admin dashboard - PASS
Frontend: User Management page shows stats cards (Total: 27, Admins: 5, HR: 22) - PASS

Frontend: Promote button not shown for Admin users - PASS
Frontend: Promote button click shows confirmation dialog - PASS

seed_data_creation: Master Admin seeded on startup (idempotent) with username=masteradmin, email=sandeepdby@gmail.com, phone=9886260579
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully tested and working. 1) Master Admin (masteradmin/Admin@123) is seeded on startup via seed_master_admin() function - idempotent. Master Admin has email sandeepdby@gmail.com and phone 9886260579. 2) PUT /api/users/{id}/promote endpoint allows Admin to promote HR users to Admin role. Returns 400 if already Admin, 403 if caller is not Admin. 3) POST /api/endorsements now generates Excel attachment and sends email to fixed recipients (ks@aarogya-assist.com, connect@aarogya-assist.com) plus all Admin portal users. Email logs confirm successful delivery. 4) User Management page shows Promote button (ArrowUpCircle icon) only for HR users, not for Admin users.

master_admin_seed.details: Master Admin seeded on startup with username=masteradmin, password=Admin@123, email=sandeepdby@gmail.com, phone=9886260579. Login verified working.

promote_hr_to_admin.details: PUT /api/users/{id}/promote endpoint works correctly. Promotes HR to Admin, returns 400 if already Admin, returns 403 for non-Admin caller.

email_with_excel_on_endorsement.details: POST /api/endorsements generates Excel attachment and sends email to ks@aarogya-assist.com, connect@aarogya-assist.com + all Admin users. Verified in backend logs.

frontend_promote_button.details: Promote button (ArrowUpCircle) visible only for HR users (22 buttons found). Not shown for Admin users. Click shows confirmation dialog.

user_management_page.promote_buttons: 22 promote buttons found (one for each HR user)
